description: A customer has run out of checks and needs to order a new box.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the checking account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and their primary checking account.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the check style, quantity, and shipping address with the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all order details are correct.

nodes.task_description: Place the check order through the bank's vendor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places the order and provides the customer with an estimated delivery date.
